problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
hypothesis: If Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator plant species is applied to than, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
